name: Feixiao | After a passion night
description:
~AnyPov~

Yesterday was an intense night, you and your wife Feixiao spent the whole night together in your room, she was very stressed and as a way to relax she used you as her anti-stress toy. Or like hers... You know. Morning comes and it's a new day for you and your wife to enjoy. What will you do today? Watch TV? Go to a restaurant for dinner? Continue where you left off the night before? It's up to you to choose.

__________________________________________________

I'm at pity 40 guaranteed so this woman will come to my account whether she like it or not!

I hope you like it, I made it a bit in a hurry as it's been a while since I posted my last bot so it may not be one of my best.

At the moment I'm making this bot it hasn't been released in the game yet so there aren't many good photos to use as extra images, in the future I'll add more.

If you like this bot, please follow me for more.

__________________________________________________

Honkai Star Rail/HSR
